scripts.build: npm run generate:types && npm run build -w @teamgrid/api-client && npm run build -w @teamgrid/cli && npm run build -w @teamgrid/mcp-server
scripts.check: node scripts/check-contract-manifest.mjs && npm run generate:types && git diff --exit-code -- packages/api-client/src/generated/schema.ts && npm run build -w @teamgrid/api-client && npm run build -w @teamgrid/cli && npm run build -w @teamgrid/mcp-server && npm run typecheck -w @teamgrid/api-client && npm run typecheck -w @teamgrid/cli && npm run typecheck -w @teamgrid/mcp-server && npm run typecheck:staging-e2e && npm run contract:surfaces && node scripts/check-client-version.mjs && biome check packages scripts
scripts.test: npm run build -w @teamgrid/api-client && npm run build -w @teamgrid/cli && vitest run
scripts.verify: npm run check && npm test && npm run build && npm run pack:check
